condition.selected: Scale of 5 — it shows more detail.

incorrects.description: Student selected Scale of 5: misconception that more detail is always better

steps.text: You're working on it. All the numbers end in 0, so Scale of 5 would create extra lines you don't need. Which scale matches these numbers best?

condition.selected: Scale of 2 — it works for any numbers.

incorrects.description: Student selected Scale of 2: misconception that smallest scale is always appropriate

steps.text: Let's think about this together. To reach 90 with Scale of 2, you'd need 45 lines. That's too many. What scale fits these numbers better?

incorrects.description: Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

params.description: All values pulse briefly to show they end in 0

steps.text: Here, let me walk you through this one. Look at the numbers: 30, 70, 90, 50. They all end in 0. Scale of 10 matches perfectly. It gives you just 10 lines to reach 90.
